isomorphic-git — the Git engine the holospace-scm Source Control provider runs as
native exec on the browser peer (CC-51). A faithful, spec-conformant pure-JS Git
implementation; its commit/tree/blob objects ARE canonical Git objects (the
on-disk object format is the external authority a commit re-derives against,
Law L5), readable by stock `git`.

Imported external artifact, κ-pinned (Law L5 at the import boundary): the
extension re-derives each bundle to its sha256 before it runs.

  version:  isomorphic-git@1.27.1  (npm; https://github.com/isomorphic-git/isomorphic-git)
  license:  MIT

Files (the standalone UMD bundles — the only self-contained distributables; the
ESM `module` build has bare imports and is not standalone):

  index.umd.min.js   the Git engine    (npm: isomorphic-git/index.umd.min.js)
  http-web.umd.js    the web smart-http client for push/pull
                     (npm: isomorphic-git/http/web/index.umd.js)

Reproduce:
  npm pack isomorphic-git@1.27.1   # or: npm install isomorphic-git@1.27.1
  cp node_modules/isomorphic-git/index.umd.min.js        index.umd.min.js
  cp node_modules/isomorphic-git/http/web/index.umd.js   http-web.umd.js
  sha256sum index.umd.min.js http-web.umd.js  # must match SHA256SUMS

Pins are also embedded in extension.js (GIT_PINS) and verified at load.
